title: Python Basics Set 1
description: Introductory classroom tasks for loops, conditionals, and functions.

tasks.title: Even or Odd
tasks.description: Write a program that reads an integer and prints whether it is even or odd.
tasks.outputFormat: Print 'Even' if n is even, otherwise print 'Odd'
tasks.starterCode:
n = int(input())
# write your code below
solutionSteps: Print Even if true, otherwise print Odd
